caption: A man wearing a grey, tall, textured wig, glasses, and a white blazer with a red bow tie is seated in a studio setting. He wears black headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall filled with numerous framed photographs and various clothing items on hangers. On-screen graphics include a logo for "BOSS TALK PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK JOY" on the right. As the sequence progresses, text appearing at the bottom of the screen evolves from red blocks to the phrase "WHOLE LOTTA WOOD SH*T" in white, followed by "BOSS TALK 101" in red. The man remains relatively still, maintaining a neutral expression and looking toward someone off-camera, with only slight changes in his posture and facial movement across the frames.
